title: The Eyes: Watch.Jar
description: You feel watch... even in your house. they're everywhere you can't escape them. This is a fanmade modpack.
body:
---Mod Work In Progress---

This is a FanMade Modpack
This Modpack Includes Non-Gameplay Affected Mod And Watch.jar Obviously Scary Vibes Mods And More Have Fun!
Watch.jar is a ARG-style psychological horror mod that transforms Minecraft into a tense, unpredictable world where the most terrifying element is the feeling of being watched.
**This is a Horror Modpack so play this at your own risk**

Credits To:

**[YTSH](https://www.youtube.com/@y.t.s.h)** (creator of the mod)

**[Thyfer](https://www.youtube.com/@Thyfordnyr)** (Mod Suggestions)

**[NogNut](https://www.youtube.com/@NogNut)** (Mod Suggestions)
